userdoc.notice: Script used to deploy and configure the Safe contracts which are used to manage the Superchain,         as the ProxyAdminOwner and other roles in the system. Note that this script is not executable in a         production environment as some steps depend on having a quorum of signers available. This script is meant to         be used as an example to guide the setup and configuration of the Safe contracts.
